summary: Completed frontend testing of Service Desk module. All requested features verified and working correctly: full-screen mode, admin login, ticket list with 277+ tickets, detail panel with 5 tabs (CONVERSATION, INFO, TIME ENTRY, ATTACHMENTS, ACTIVITY), AI Summary button, Edit button, and Reply to Ticket button.

issues: Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in ServiceDesk component
Console warning: Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent in modals

service_desk_fullscreen_mode.details: Service Desk opens in full-screen workspace mode with 'Service Desk - Unified Ticket Management' header

admin_login.details: Admin login works with credentials aditya/lola4304. Two-step login: first /admin, then Service Desk workspace

ticket_list_display.details: 277 Open Tickets displayed in stats bar. Ticket list shows 50 tickets with filters for Status, Category, Urgency

ticket_detail_panel.details: Clicking a ticket shows detail panel with ticket ID, status badge, Edit button, and tabbed interface

conversation_tab.details: CONVERSATION tab shows Member Details, Customer History, Assignment section, Activity Timeline, and Conversation messages

info_tab.details: INFO tab shows Contact Information (Name, Email, Phone, City) and Ticket Details (Category, Urgency, Assigned To, Source, Created/Updated dates)

time_entry_tab.details: TIME ENTRY tab shows Time Entries section with Add Entry button

attachments_tab.details: ATTACHMENTS tab shows Attachments section (displays 'No attachments' when empty)

activity_tab.details: ACTIVITY tab shows Activity Timeline with events like 'created' and 'Agent replied' with timestamps

ai_summary_button.details: AI Summary button opens modal with Number of Conversations selector (10/20/30/50), Include checkboxes (Incoming/Outgoing/Internal notes), and Generate button

edit_button.details: Edit button opens Edit Ticket modal with Subject/Title, Category/Pillar, Urgency, Assigned To, Description fields, and Save Changes button

reply_to_ticket_button.details: Reply to Ticket button opens Reply Modal with Internal Note/Email/WhatsApp options, Templates, AI Draft, Message textarea, and Attachments (Document/Image/Voice)

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add unique 'key' prop to list items in ServiceDesk component to fix React warning
Minor: Add aria-describedby or Description to DialogContent components for accessibility
seed_data_creation: None - used existing tickets (277+ tickets in system)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Desk module fully functional. Full-screen workspace accessible via /admin -> Service Desk -> Open Service Desk. Two-step login required (admin login + Service Desk workspace login). All 5 tabs working: CONVERSATION, INFO, TIME ENTRY, ATTACHMENTS, ACTIVITY. Edit modal, AI Summary modal, and Reply modal all functional with proper form fields and buttons.

verified_features.full_screen_mode: VERIFIED - Opens in dedicated full-screen workspace
verified_features.admin_login: VERIFIED - Two-step login with same credentials
verified_features.detail_panel_tabs: VERIFIED - All 5 tabs (CONVERSATION, INFO, TIME ENTRY, ATTACHMENTS, ACTIVITY) working
verified_features.ai_summary: VERIFIED - Modal with conversation count selector and include options
verified_features.edit_ticket: VERIFIED - Modal with all ticket fields editable
verified_features.reply_to_ticket: VERIFIED - Modal with Internal Note/Email/WhatsApp, Templates, AI Draft options
